eligibility: Children studying in government and government-aided schools from Class I to VIII
benefits: Free nutritious meals to improve nutritional status and encourage school attendance

eligibility: Economically weaker sections, low-income groups, and middle-income groups with annual income up to ₹18 lakhs
benefits: Subsidy for purchasing or constructing houses, interest subsidy on home loans

schemeName: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
eligibility: Families identified as poor and vulnerable based on SECC database
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization

eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with landholding up to 2 hectares
benefits: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments

eligibility: All rural and urban local bodies, individuals can participate in cleanliness drives
benefits: Construction of individual household latrines, community toilets, and solid waste management

eligibility: All districts with low child sex ratio, families with girl children
benefits: Cash incentives for girl child education, awareness campaigns, improved sex ratio

eligibility: Small business owners, entrepreneurs, self-employed individuals
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakhs for non-farm income generating activities

eligibility: Citizens aged 18-40 years, bank account holders
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after 60 years
Broadband connectivity, digital literacy, e-governance services

eligibility: Pregnant women and lactating mothers, first living child, age 19 or above
benefits: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 in three installments for maternity benefit

eligibility: Youth aged 15-35 years, school/college dropouts, unemployed
benefits: Free skill training, certification, placement assistance

eligibility: Women from below poverty line households
benefits: Free LPG connections to 8 crore BPL households
